title: nulls-reborn-catharsis
description: Port of the nulls-reborn-dv Hypixel Skyblock resource pack for 1.21.11 Catharsis
body:
# nulls-reborn

A resource pack made for **Hypixel Skyblock** that attempts to give a unique texture to most null items in the game. This pack is a port of [nulls-reborn-dv](https://github.com/BlendyDev/nulls-reborn-dv) (which itself is a port of [the original nulls-reborn](https://hypixel.net/threads/nulls-reborn-2-0-1-8-9-null-texture-pack.4175552/), but replaces [CIT](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/cit.html) with [Catharsis](https://catharsis.meowdd.ing/), the now more adopted solution for custom item resource packs for Skyblock). 

The original version of **nulls-reborn v2** was created by [FaasNax](https://hypixel.net/members/faasnax.2951907/), Zeroing, [Shy0](https://hypixel.net/members/shy0.3819318/) and [SpikezillaRox](https://hypixel.net/members/spikezillarox.2617038/).

Requires [catharsis](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis) to run.

![88x31](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7856761beaafb3606683058549a055e7761d241.png)
